base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of medium_enemies_atlas — a character (enemy_group) from 1987 final fantasy. Medium-enemy roster — unicorns/sahagins/medusas/cocatrices/manticores/ogres/sharks/tritons/giants/werewolves. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
